notes: blackout dates apply (e.g., October, special events)
raw: Free or discounted admission equivalent to a Family Membership admission price for two adults and children under 18 at Trustees of the Reservation's properties in Massachusetts that charge an admission fee, including The DeCordova, Fruitlands, and The Old Manse. For a list of Trustees properties, please visit https://thetrustees.org/ GO Passes are valid for admission fees only. Passes are not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, Inns, campgrounds, special events, or equipment rentals, or in place of any permits or passes. This coupon pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk. Advanced ticket reservations made in advance of visit are strongly encouraged on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding the coupon pass use will be provided in your confirmation email. Please contact individual institutions for hours of operation. Please note that reserving a library pass does not guarantee that space will be available on your preferred date. UPDATE FROM DECORDOVA MUSEUM : Please note the temporary suspension of the indoor galleries at deCordova Sculpture Park and Museum. The Sculpture Park remains open, and no other facilities, programs, events, or activities are affected, including the store or café. The temporary suspension allows us to upgrade our HVAC and climate control systems to ensure that our indoor exhibition spaces meet The Trustees’ and the museum industries’ stringent standards. We expect this process to take two-three years and we will share updates and ways to get involved in the coming months. For more information, please click here .
